message:
feat(reproduce): implement wa reproduce command for incident bundles

Add `wa reproduce` CLI command that exports portable, redacted incident
bundles for sharing or analysis. The command gathers the most recent
crash bundle (crash report, manifest, health snapshot), config summary,
and writes them to a timestamped directory with an incident manifest.

Core additions (wa-core/crash.rs):
- IncidentKind enum (Crash, Manual)
- IncidentBundleResult struct with path, kind, files, size, version
- export_incident_bundle() with redaction, config inclusion, size limits
- 5 tests: crash with/without bundle, manual kind, config inclusion, display

CLI additions (wa/main.rs):
- Reproduce command variant with --kind, --out, --format flags
- Handler with text/JSON output modes
- Actionable next-steps guidance in text output

Closes wa-upg.1.3

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
